# ARC-100 distribution mirror

**Generated by `release.sh` from the private canonical repo — do not open
PRs here.** This repository is the artifacts-only distribution channel for
the ARC-100 documentation standard. The current release is always HEAD of
`main`; `vN` tags are immutable bookmarks.

Current release: **v3** (canonical source SHA `60a57a580cd98099c801db38152e04a2ac2de27e`)

## Quickstart

```sh
CLONE="$(mktemp -d)"
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/arc-100-standard/ARC-100-dist.git "$CLONE"
cd /path/to/your-project && python3 "$CLONE/tools/arc_sync.py" --target .
rm -rf "$CLONE"
```

The target project must carry an `ARC-100-SYNC.config.yml` whose
only required key is `project_name`; `local_index_path` and
`local_chapter_root` are optional overrides, convention-derived
otherwise. Full adopter documentation ships with the standard's
Book 00 chapters (`mirror/docs/00/`).

## Licensing

The ARC-100 standard's content, assets, and tooling are licensed under the
ARC-100 Distribution License 1.0 (see `LICENSE`): personal and internal use
permitted; no resale, no public redistribution as a standalone mirror, no
AI/ML training. The synced content may appear within your own project's
documentation. The bundled Inter fonts are third-party and remain under the
SIL Open Font License 1.1 (see `mirror/assets/arc100/fonts/LICENSE.txt`,
synced into adopter trees at `assets/arc100/fonts/LICENSE.txt`).
